title: What is xAPI?
bullets: Experience tracking standard for learning events
speaker_notes: Introduce xAPI as a shared language for learning data. Spend about 45 seconds establishing why statements matter (45s).
visual_idea: Show multiple learning apps feeding one central learning record store.

title: Workshop Roadmap
speaker_notes: Preview the workshop flow to reduce uncertainty. Keep this quick and move on in 30 seconds (30s).
visual_idea: Display a simple three-step workshop timeline.

title: Navigate the Docs
bullets: Use Fundamentals and Core Structure pages
Open Twine stories for guided practice
speaker_notes: Show where every needed resource lives before coding begins. Allow 40 seconds for navigation orientation (40s).
visual_idea: Screenshot of site menu highlighting key documentation sections.

title: Statement Anatomy
speaker_notes: Explain the statement as a structured event record. Spend 50 seconds framing the mental model (50s).
visual_idea: Annotated JSON block with highlighted field groups.

title: Actor – Verb – Object
speaker_notes: Focus only on the three mandatory statement components. Keep this foundational segment to 60 seconds (60s).
visual_idea: Three connected boxes labeled Actor, Verb, and Object.

title: Optional Fields Overview
speaker_notes: Show how optional fields enrich meaning without changing validity. Limit explanation to 50 seconds (50s).
visual_idea: Expandable JSON sections revealing optional properties.

title: Validation and IRIs
bullets: IRIs uniquely identify verbs and activities
speaker_notes: Connect validation rules directly to common errors. Spend about 55 seconds on this checkpoint (55s).
visual_idea: Good versus bad IRI examples side by side.

title: Sending a Statement via Proxy
speaker_notes: Walk through the live send path step by step using the story. Allocate 75 seconds for the demo click-through (75s).
visual_idea: Flow diagram from browser form to proxy to LRS.

title: Verify in the LRS
speaker_notes: Immediately verify that the submitted record arrived correctly. Use 45 seconds for this confidence-building step (45s).
visual_idea: LRS dashboard screenshot with newest statement highlighted.

title: Common Failures
speaker_notes: Normalize failure by showing the four most likely demo issues. Reserve 60 seconds for rapid troubleshooting tips (60s).
visual_idea: Four warning icons mapped to each failure category.

title: Lab Safety — No Secrets in Client
bullets: Client sends requests to Netlify function
speaker_notes: Explain why secrets stay server-side using the proxy pattern. Spend 50 seconds reinforcing secure habits (50s).
visual_idea: Browser-to-proxy-to-LRS diagram with locked credentials icon.

title: Next Steps + Links
speaker_notes: Close by directing participants to self-study resources and follow-up practice. Finish in 30 seconds and invite questions (30s).
visual_idea: Resource hub slide with four clickable link placeholders.
